lore: The legendary crispy treat of Famima convenience stores. Transmutes greasy goodness into pure vitality and raw combat morale.
A sleek alchemical slate that grants lightning-fast travel through the Tokyo transit grid. Beeps with raw lightning power.
A sleek alchemical slate that grants lightning-fast travel through the Tokyo transit grid. Beeps with raw lightning power.
Equipped with a clipboard and high standards. One glare can dismiss a RAG chatbot instantly. Requires absolute visual wow-factor to appease.
Brewed in the heart of Tokyo's vending machines. Contains enough raw alchemical energy to power a developer through a 48-hour hackathon.

Clacked into existence by a sleep-deprived coder. Its heavy mechanical steel switches deal massive alchemical earth damage.

Through lenses of profound observation, this alchemist discerns the hidden weaknesses of foes. Their unwavering gaze grants unparalleled precision in combat.
This discarded plastic vessel, once filled with the revitalizing essence of Pocari Sweat, still hums with residual ionic energy. It grants a momentary surge of life to those who wield its empty form.
This alchemist's power lies in their meticulous observation, seeing patterns and weaknesses others miss. Their keen intellect allows them to react with unparalleled swiftness.
This shimmering purple elixir, bottled within a humble aluminum shell, unleashes a torrent of sugary energy. Its potent fizz can shock foes, leaving them reeling from its unexpected burst.
This alchemist's keen eyes pierce through illusions, revealing hidden truths and weaknesses. Their focused gaze allows them to anticipate foes, turning observation into a tactical advantage.
Woven from threads imbued with the spirit of ancient protectors, the Crimson Sentinel stands firm. Its vibrant turban radiates a fiery aura, shielding allies from harm.

Forged from the whispers of the wind and the hum of distant cities, these headphones channel pure sonic energy. They allow their wielder to perceive unseen threats and unleash disruptive waves of sound.
Clacked into existence by a sleep-deprived coder. Its heavy mechanical steel switches deal massive alchemical earth damage.

Woven from threads of digital wisdom, this ancient-looking codex holds the power to ignite the minds of its wielder, revealing forgotten strategies.

This digital guardian holds the very essence of connection, unlocking vast computational power. Its glowing lines of code are conduits for raw data, ready to empower its allies.
